title: Flip Free Stuff - LA 2026
subtitle: Facebook Marketplace + OfferUp, zero-dollar start
summary: A fast-start flipping loop using free listings from local marketplaces. The goal is to claim, clean, and relist the same day for cash.

bullets: Open Facebook Marketplace and set location to Los Angeles (30-50 miles).
Filter price = Free and sort by Newest.
Search: free couch, free dresser, free furniture, free TV, curb alert, free moving.
Check OfferUp and Nextdoor free sections too.

playbook.template: Hey, is this still available? I can pick up today or tomorrow morning if it works - cash in hand and ready to go!
bullets: Reply to the first 3-5 new posts you see.
Speed wins - movers and landlords want it gone.
Start with small items if you do not have a truck (lamps, chairs, side tables, mirrors).
Offer $10-$20 gas money if they need help moving.
Hot areas: Valley, Long Beach, Pasadena, West LA, Koreatown.
List on OfferUp and Facebook Marketplace.
Meet in public and follow platform safety guidance.
Cash or instant transfer on the spot.

safety_notes: Meet in public and follow platform safety guidance.
Use cash or confirmed instant transfer on the spot.
Bring a friend for large pickups when possible.
scale_up: Once you have $200-$300 profit, buy ugly-but-solid pieces for $20-$50 and flip after a quick clean or paint.
call_to_action: Pick one lane, run it for 7 days, then review what sold fastest.
